requirement_topic.en: Low Voltage Safety — EV Charging Equipment (General) — Norway (EEA)
requirement_topic.zh: 低压安全——电动汽车充电设备（通用）——挪威（EEA）
requirement_topic.zht: 低壓安全——電動汽車充電設備（通用）——挪威（EEA）

summary.en: EV charging equipment placed on the Norway/EEA market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU (applicable in Norway via the EEA Agreement), ensuring it is designed and manufactured to be safe when correctly installed and maintained. Equipment must meet the Essential Safety Requirements (Annex I) covering protection against electric shock, insulation, overcurrent/overtemperature protection, and clearances. Harmonised standard EN IEC 61851-1:2019 (Mode 1–4 conductive charging, AC and DC, general requirements) provides a presumption of conformity.
summary.zh: 在挪威/EEA市场销售的电动汽车充电设备须符合低电压指令2014/35/EU（通过EEA协议适用于挪威），确保其在正确安装及维护条件下安全运行。设备须满足附件I基本安全要求，涵盖防触电、绝缘、过流/过温保护及电气间隙。协调标准EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4传导充电，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。
summary.zht: 在挪威/EEA市場銷售的電動汽車充電設備須符合低電壓指令2014/35/EU（通過EEA協議適用於挪威），確保其在正確安裝及維護條件下安全運行。設備須滿足附件I基本安全要求，涵蓋防觸電、絕緣、過流/過溫保護及電氣間隙。協調標準EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4傳導充電，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/35/EU (Low Voltage Directive — applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement)
EN IEC 61851-1:2019 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

summary.en: China commonly references GB/T 18487.1-2015 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements), which is technically aligned with IEC 61851-1 but incorporates national deviations. It is enforced under the GB framework administered by SAMR/SAC. GB/T 18487.1 testing and certification by a Chinese CNAS-accredited lab is NOT recognised as equivalent to EN IEC 61851-1 testing under the Norway/EEA LVD conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国常见参考标准为GB/T 18487.1-2015（电动汽车传导充电系统——通用要求），技术上与IEC 61851-1相关但含有国家偏差，由市场监管总局/国家标准化管理委员会监督执行。国内CNAS认可实验室依据GB/T 18487.1出具的检测及认证，不被挪威/EEA LVD合格评定程序直接认可为等同。
summary.zht: 中國常見參考標準為GB/T 18487.1-2015（電動汽車傳導充電系統——通用要求），技術上與IEC 61851-1相關但含有國家偏差，由市場監管總局/國家標準化管理委員會監督執行。國內CNAS認可實驗室依據GB/T 18487.1出具的檢測及認證，不被挪威/EEA LVD合格評定路徑直接認可為等同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements (SAMR/SAC)

gap.en: Exporters should build an EEA conformity file against the LVD essential safety requirements and may use EN IEC 61851-1:2019 testing as evidence for presumption of conformity. Existing Chinese GB/T 18487.1 test reports do not automatically substitute because scope, deviations, connector assumptions and documentation differ. A Notified Body is not mandatory for LVD; manufacturer self-declaration with a Technical File is the normal route. Documentation gap: EU Declaration of Conformity, CE marking, and EU/EEA-language technical instructions are all required.
gap.zh: 出口商应围绕低压指令基本安全要求建立EEA合规技术文件，并可采用EN IEC 61851-1:2019检测作为推定符合性的证据。现有GB/T 18487.1检测报告不会自动替代，因为范围、偏差、接口假设及文件要求不同。低压指令通常不强制要求公告机构；制造商自我声明加技术文件是常规路径。文件差距：需提供欧盟符合性声明、CE标志及欧盟/EEA语言技术说明书。
gap.zht: 出口商應圍繞低電壓指令基本安全要求建立EEA合規技術文件，並可採用EN IEC 61851-1:2019檢測作為推定符合性的證據。現有GB/T 18487.1檢測報告不會自動替代，因為範圍、偏差、接口假設及文件要求不同。低電壓指令通常不強制要求公告機構；製造商自我聲明加技術文件是常規路徑。文件差距：需提供歐盟符合性聲明、CE標誌及歐盟/EEA語言技術說明書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: Directive 2014/35/EU and CE marking before Norway/EEA market placement (applicable via EEA Agreement). EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is voluntary harmonised-standard evidence for presumption of conformity; alternative technical solutions are allowed if the manufacturer demonstrates compliance with the LVD essential safety requirements.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 18487.1 compliance required under SAMR framework

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU (applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement) is mandatory. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is a voluntary harmonised standard that can grant presumption of conformity for general EV conductive charging; it is not the legal obligation itself. Chinese GB/T 18487.1 certification does not by itself satisfy the Norway/EEA conformity assessment pathway; EU evidence against the LVD requirements is needed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据LVD 2014/35/EU（通过EEA协议适用于挪威），CE标志为强制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用于电动汽车传导充电通用要求推定符合性的自愿协调标准，并非法律义务本身。中国GB/T 18487.1认证本身不满足挪威/EEA合格评定路径；仍需提供针对LVD要求的欧盟证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據LVD 2014/35/EU（通過EEA協議適用於挪威），CE標誌為強制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用於電動汽車傳導充電通用要求推定符合性的自願協調標準，並非法律義務本身。中國GB/T 18487.1認證本身不滿足挪威/EEA合格評定路徑；仍需提供針對LVD要求的歐盟證據。

requirement_topic.en: DC Charging Station Safety — EV Conductive Charging (Norway/EEA)
requirement_topic.zh: 直流充电站安全——电动汽车传导充电（挪威/EEA）
requirement_topic.zht: 直流充電站安全——電動汽車傳導充電（挪威/EEA）

summary.en: DC charging stations (Mode 4, off-board chargers) placed on the Norway/EEA market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU (applicable in Norway via the EEA Agreement) where within scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station) is a current product standard that may be used as technical evidence and, where cited as harmonised, gives presumption of conformity; it is not itself the mandatory legal obligation. Key technical topics include isolation monitoring, interlock systems, control pilot functions, maximum voltage/current ratings, and communication protocols for DC supply.
summary.zh: 投放挪威/EEA市场的直流充电站（模式4，非车载充电机）在适用范围内须符合低电压指令2014/35/EU（通过EEA协议适用于挪威）。EN IEC 61851-23:2023（电动汽车传导充电系统——第23部分：直流电动汽车充电站）是现行产品标准，可作为技术证据使用；在被列为协调标准时，可产生推定符合性，但其本身并非强制性法律义务。核心技术主题包括绝缘监控、互锁系统、控制引导功能、最大电压/电流额定值及直流供电通信协议。
summary.zht: 投放挪威/EEA市場的直流充電站（模式4，非車載充電機）在適用範圍內須符合低電壓指令2014/35/EU（通過EEA協議適用於挪威）。EN IEC 61851-23:2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統——第23部分：直流電動汽車充電站）是現行產品標準，可作為技術證據使用；在被列為協調標準時，可產生推定符合性，但其本身並非強制性法律義務。核心技術主題包括絕緣監控、互鎖系統、控制導引功能、最大電壓/電流額定值及直流供電通訊協議。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station (current edition, supersedes 2014)
Directive 2014/35/EU (Low Voltage Directive — applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement)

summary.en: China's DC charging station domestic equivalent is GB/T 18487.3-2001 (AC/DC electric vehicle charging station — the only published Part 3 of the 18487 series; note: a GB/T 18487.3-2015 does not exist). The current DC system standard is GB/T 18487.5-2024 (DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3 connector). The DC coupler standard is GB/T 20234.3-2023 (superseded by GB/T 20234.3-2023 which supports up to 1500 V / 800 A). CQC or CNAS certification to these Chinese standards is not accepted under the Norway/EEA LVD CE marking pathway.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电站国内对应标准为GB/T 18487.3-2001（交直流电动汽车充电站——GB/T 18487系列第3部分的唯一发布版本；注：GB/T 18487.3-2015并不存在）。现行直流系统标准为GB/T 18487.5-2024（适用于GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充电系统）。直流耦合器标准为GB/T 20234.3-2023（支持最高1500V/800A）。依据上述中国标准获得的CQC或CNAS认证，在挪威/EEA LVD CE标志合格评定路径下不被接受。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電站國內對應標準為GB/T 18487.3-2001（交直流電動汽車充電站——GB/T 18487系列第3部分的唯一發布版本；注：GB/T 18487.3-2015並不存在）。現行直流系統標準為GB/T 18487.5-2024（適用於GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充電系統）。直流耦合器標準為GB/T 20234.3-2023（支持最高1500V/800A）。依據上述中國標準獲得的CQC或CNAS認證，在挪威/EEA LVD CE標誌合格評定路徑下不被接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.3-2001 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — AC/DC electric vehicle charging station (only published edition; no 2015 revision exists)
GB/T 18487.5-2024 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 5: DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3 (current DC system standard)
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler (supersedes 2015 edition)

gap.en: DC charging stations exported to Norway/EEA should be assessed against the LVD essential safety requirements and may use EN IEC 61851-23:2023 testing as presumption-of-conformity evidence where applicable. Particular attention is needed for: (1) CCS2 (Combined Charging System Type 2) connector compliance vs. Chinese GB/T connector; (2) isolation monitoring requirements per European/Norwegian grid topology; and (3) CCS2 communication protocol compatibility. The connector type itself is a hardware gap — Chinese DC stations typically use GB/T 20234.3 plugs, which are not CCS2 compatible without hardware redesign.
gap.zh: 出口挪威/EEA的直流充电站应针对LVD基本安全要求进行评估，并可在适用时采用EN IEC 61851-23:2023检测作为推定符合性证据。重点关注：（1）CCS2（组合充电系统2型）连接器合规性与中国GB/T连接器的差异；（2）欧洲/挪威电网拓扑下的绝缘监控要求；（3）CCS2通信协议兼容性。连接器本身构成硬件差距——中国直流充电站通常使用GB/T 20234.3插头，在未经硬件重新设计的情况下与CCS2不兼容。
gap.zht: 出口挪威/EEA的直流充電站應針對LVD基本安全要求進行評估，並可在適用時採用EN IEC 61851-23:2023檢測作為推定符合性證據。重點關注：（1）CCS2（組合充電系統2型）連接器合規性與中國GB/T連接器的差異；（2）歐洲/挪威電網拓撲下的絕緣監控要求；（3）CCS2通訊協議相容性。連接器本身構成硬體差距——中國直流充電站通常使用GB/T 20234.3插頭，在未經硬體重新設計的情況下與CCS2不相容。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: CE marking under Directive 2014/35/EU (applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement) where the charger is within LVD scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 is a voluntary technical standard that may support presumption of conformity where harmonised/cited; alternatives are allowed if the manufacturer demonstrates compliance with the Directive.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 18487.5-2024 is the current DC charging system standard; CCC mandatory from 1 March 2025 under CNCA-C25-01:2024

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DC charging stations require CE marking under the applicable EEA legislation (LVD 2014/35/EU, applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement) where in scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 is a voluntary product standard used as technical evidence or presumption-of-conformity support where harmonised; it is not mandatory in itself. Chinese GB/T 18487.3 certification is not accepted as an EEA conformity assessment substitute. A significant hardware gap exists where Chinese DC stations use GB/T connectors incompatible with Norway/EEA CCS2 practice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 直流充电站须依据适用EEA法律（低压指令2014/35/EU，通过EEA协议适用于挪威）在适用范围内取得CE标志。EN IEC 61851-23:2023是可作为技术证据或在协调时用于推定符合性的自愿产品标准，并非自身强制。中国GB/T 18487.3认证不能替代EEA合格评定。若中国直流充电站使用与挪威/EEA CCS2实践不兼容的GB/T连接器，则存在重大硬件差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 直流充電站須依據適用EEA法律（低電壓指令2014/35/EU，通過EEA協議適用於挪威）在適用範圍內取得CE標誌。EN IEC 61851-23:2023是可作為技術證據或在協調時用於推定符合性的自願產品標準，並非自身強制。中國GB/T 18487.3認證不能替代EEA合格評定。若中國直流充電站使用與挪威/EEA CCS2實務不相容的GB/T連接器，則存在重大硬體差距。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Installation Safety — EV Charging in Buildings, Norway (NEK EN 60364-7-722 / IT Earthing)
requirement_topic.zh: 建筑内电动汽车充电电气安装安全——挪威（NEK EN 60364-7-722／IT接地）
requirement_topic.zht: 建築內電動汽車充電電氣安裝安全——挪威（NEK EN 60364-7-722／IT接地）

summary.en: Norwegian electrical installation law and grid/installer rules govern the building-side circuits supplying EV charging points. IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 provide the commonly adopted technical installation route covering protective measures (RCD type B or A+DC detection), wiring, earthing, and load management. In Norway, HD 60364-7-722 is adopted as NEK EN 60364-7-722 and enforced through DSOs and local el-tilsyn (electrical inspection authorities). A critical Norway-specific consideration is earthing system compatibility: Norway has historically used IT earthing systems in many areas (particularly older industrial and rural installations), though TN-S is common in newer residential construction. The mixed IT/TN earthing environment means Type B RCD requirements for EV charging should be verified against the specific site's earthing system. EV chargers exported to Norway should declare compatibility with both IT and TN earthing systems and specify the required RCD type for each configuration.
summary.zh: 挪威电气安装法律及电网/安装方规则规范电动汽车充电点的建筑侧供电回路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技术安装路径，涵盖保护措施（B型RCD或A型+直流检测）、布线、接地及负荷管理。在挪威，HD 60364-7-722以NEK EN 60364-7-722的形式采纳，通过配电运营商和地方el-tilsyn（电气检查机构）执行。挪威特有的关键考虑是接地系统兼容性：挪威历史上许多地区（尤其是老旧工业和农村装置）采用IT接地系统，但新建住宅通常采用TN-S。混合IT/TN接地环境意味着电动汽车充电的B型RCD要求应根据具体场址的接地系统加以核实。出口挪威的充电桩应声明与IT和TN接地系统均兼容，并为每种配置说明所需RCD类型。
summary.zht: 挪威電氣安裝法律及電網/安裝方規則規範電動汽車充電點的建築側供電迴路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技術安裝路徑，涵蓋保護措施（B型RCD或A型+直流檢測）、布線、接地及負荷管理。在挪威，HD 60364-7-722以NEK EN 60364-7-722的形式採納，通過配電運營商和地方el-tilsyn（電氣檢查機構）執行。挪威特有的關鍵考慮是接地系統相容性：挪威歷史上許多地區（尤其是老舊工業和農村裝置）採用IT接地系統，但新建住宅通常採用TN-S。混合IT/TN接地環境意味著電動汽車充電的B型RCD要求應根據具體場址的接地系統加以核實。出口挪威的充電樁應聲明與IT和TN接地系統均相容，並為每種配置說明所需RCD類型。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60364-7-722:2018 — Low-voltage electrical installations — Part 7-722: Requirements for special installations or locations — Supply of electric vehicles
NEK EN 60364-7-722 — Norwegian adoption of HD 60364-7-722:2018 (HD 60364-7-722:2018 is the current CENELEC harmonisation document, approved 27 August 2018; adopted in Norway as NEK EN 60364-7-722)
Norway el-tilsyn (electrical inspection) requirements for EV charging installation
DSO project-acceptance requirements for earthing, protection, and metering

summary.en: China addresses EV charging installation primarily through GB 50966-2014 (Code for design of electric vehicle charging station) and GB/T 51313-2018 (Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure), administered by the Ministry of Housing and Urban-Rural Development (MOHURD). These cover site design and installation but differ from NEK EN 60364-7-722 / IEC 60364-7-722 in RCD type requirements, earthing system assumptions (TN-S vs. Norwegian IT/TN mixed practice), and load management protocols. Chinese installation documentation is not accepted as evidence of compliance with Norwegian/EEA installation standards.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过GB 50966-2014（电动汽车充电站设计规范）及GB/T 51313-2018（电动汽车充电基础设施技术标准）处理充电安装事宜，由住房和城乡建设部负责管理。上述标准涵盖场地设计及安装，但在RCD类型要求、接地系统假设（TN-S与挪威IT/TN混合实践的差异）及负荷管理协议方面与NEK EN 60364-7-722 / IEC 60364-7-722存在差异。中国安装文件不被接受作为符合挪威/EEA安装标准的证据。
summary.zht: 中國主要通過GB 50966-2014（電動汽車充電站設計規範）及GB/T 51313-2018（電動汽車充電基礎設施技術標準）處理充電安裝事宜，由住房和城鄉建設部負責管理。上述標準涵蓋場地設計及安裝，但在RCD類型要求、接地系統假設（TN-S與挪威IT/TN混合實務的差異）及負荷管理協議方面與NEK EN 60364-7-722 / IEC 60364-7-722存在差異。中國安裝文件不被接受作為符合挪威/EEA安裝標準的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 50966-2014 — Code for design of electric vehicle charging station (MOHURD) (confirmed to exist; enforced by MOHURD/MIIT)
GB/T 51313-2018 — Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure (confirmed to exist; enforced by MOHURD/MIIT)

gap.en: NEK EN 60364-7-722 / IEC 60364-7-722 are installation standards — they govern fixed wiring and protection devices at the building side, not the charger product itself. However, exported EV chargers should declare compatibility with Type B RCDs or incorporate internal DC fault protection to allow Type A RCDs under Norwegian installation practice. Norway's historically mixed IT/TN earthing environment adds a specific compatibility requirement not typically addressed by Chinese charger datasheets: manufacturers should clearly document which earthing systems the charger supports and the required protective device configuration for each. A charger that requires installation conditions not achievable under Norwegian el-tilsyn or DSO requirements will fail field acceptance.
gap.zh: NEK EN 60364-7-722 / IEC 60364-7-722为安装标准，规范建筑侧固定布线及保护装置，而非充电设备产品本身。但出口挪威的充电设备应依据挪威安装实践声明与B型RCD兼容，或内置直流故障保护以允许使用A型RCD。挪威历史上混合IT/TN接地环境增加了中国充电设备说明书通常未涵盖的特定兼容性要求：制造商应明确记录充电设备支持哪些接地系统及每种配置所需的保护装置配置。若充电设备要求的安装条件在挪威el-tilsyn或配电运营商要求下无法实现，将无法通过现场验收。
gap.zht: NEK EN 60364-7-722 / IEC 60364-7-722為安裝標準，規範建築側固定布線及保護裝置，而非充電設備產品本身。但出口挪威的充電設備應依據挪威安裝實務聲明與B型RCD相容，或內置直流故障保護以允許使用A型RCD。挪威歷史上混合IT/TN接地環境增加了中國充電設備說明書通常未涵蓋的特定相容性要求：製造商應明確記錄充電設備支持哪些接地系統及每種配置所需的保護裝置配置。若充電設備要求的安裝條件在挪威el-tilsyn或配電運營商要求下無法實現，將無法通過現場驗收。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation sits in Norwegian electrical installation law, DSO grid codes, and el-tilsyn permitting/inspection rules. NEK EN 60364-7-722 / IEC 60364-7-722 are adopted technical standards commonly used to demonstrate accepted installation practice; product compatibility with Norway's IT/TN mixed earthing environment is a practical market requirement that must be addressed in product documentation.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic installation — GB 50966 / GB/T 51313 under MOHURD (GB 50966-2014 and GB/T 51313-2018 confirmed as published standards enforced by MOHURD; check SAC for any 2023-2025 revisions)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NEK EN 60364-7-722 / IEC 60364-7-722 govern building-side installation practice as adopted through Norwegian rules and enforced by el-tilsyn and DSOs. EV chargers exported to Norway should be compatible with the RCD and earthing requirements expected by installers and DSOs, with explicit documentation of IT and TN earthing system compatibility. This is distinct from product-level CE marking under LVD, but non-compatibility with Norway's mixed earthing environment can block field installation. Chinese installation standards (GB 50966 / GB/T 51313) are not substitutes.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] NEK EN 60364-7-722 / IEC 60364-7-722通过挪威规则采纳后规范建筑侧安装实践，由el-tilsyn和配电运营商执行。出口挪威的充电设备应与安装商及配电运营商所期望的RCD和接地要求兼容，并明确记录IT和TN接地系统兼容性。这与产品层面依据LVD取得CE标志不同，但与挪威混合接地环境不兼容会阻碍现场安装。中国安装标准（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] NEK EN 60364-7-722 / IEC 60364-7-722通過挪威規則採納後規範建築側安裝實務，由el-tilsyn和配電運營商執行。出口挪威的充電設備應與安裝商及配電運營商所期望的RCD和接地要求相容，並明確記錄IT和TN接地系統相容性。這與產品層面依據LVD取得CE標誌不同，但與挪威混合接地環境不相容會阻礙現場安裝。中國安裝標準（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。
